code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)
mut sum = 0
mut i = 0
mut stop = false
let n = tokens.len()
while i < n and not stop
  let tok = match tokens.get(i)
  when Some(t)
    t
  when None
    ""
  end
  let v = match string.parse_int(tok)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if v < 0
    stop = true
  else
    sum = sum + v
    i = i + 1
  end
end

print("partial=#{sum}")
